goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stansted airport' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee and address
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stansted airport and should leave on friday
The train should arrive by 21:00 and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
